message:
test(fcp-conformance/streaming-health-bridge): pin StreamHealthState predicates + ConnectorHealth bridge mapping + snake_case wire form (resolves flywheel_connectors-9a3yz)

17 tests covering the cross-crate observability bridge that was NOT
covered by the existing streaming_health_state_machine_conformance.rs
(which pins transitions only):

- is_available + needs_attention predicate fan-out across all four
  states; deliberate Degraded overlap (BOTH available AND attention)
  pinned as the single intersection
- to_connector_health bridge: Connected→Healthy,
  Degraded→Degraded(heartbeat-overdue reason), Reconnecting→Degraded
  (NOT Unavailable — important for transient hiccups), Unhealthy→
  Unavailable with now() timestamp
- StreamHealthState snake_case JSON wire form for all four variants;
  rejects unknown/mixed-case
- StreamHealthSnapshot skip_serializing_if=None for last_heartbeat_ms_ago
  + last_ack_ms_ago (forward compat with v1 readers); snapshot.state
  inherits snake_case rename
- messages_received saturating_add discipline (br-upgdb)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
